title: [Skyship, Research]
description: The room is divided into two separated parts.  One side is a broad, metal passage, wide and unadorned, a through-way in the section.  The other is inaccessible, hidden away behind a series of dyed blue-black panes fitted between thick metal bars that run the length of the area, floor-to-ceiling.  These panes are opaque and narrow, with room enough for only a single figure to stand at one to attempt to peer through its impossibly cloudy glaes.
